mapper.sql: SELECT a.activity_id, a.activity_no, a.activity_name, a.activity_type, a.activity_form, a.activity_status, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.budget, a.cost, a.target_count, a.target_lead_count, a.user_id, a.dept_id, a.summary, a.content, a.actual_count, a.lead_count, a.mql_count, a.sql_count, a.opportunity_count, a.deal_amount, a.actual_roi, a.del_flag, a.attachments, a.owner_phone, a.register_token, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, u.nick_name as user_name, d.dept_name, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_activity_participant p WHERE p.activity_id = a.activity_id) as signup_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_activity_participant p WHERE p.activity_id = a.activity_id AND p.participate_status = '1') as signed_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_lead l WHERE l.activity_id = a.activity_id AND l.del_flag = '0') as converted_lead_count FROM mk_activity a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_activity (activity_no, activity_name, activity_type, activity_form, activity_status, start_time, end_time, location, budget, cost, target_count, target_lead_count, user_id, dept_id, owner_phone, summary, content, attachments, register_token, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{activityNo}, #{activityName}, #{activityType}, #{activityForm}, #{activityStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{budget}, #{cost}, #{targetCount}, #{targetLeadCount}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{ownerPhone}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{attachments}, #{registerToken}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_activity SET del_flag = '2' WHERE activity_id IN #{activityId}
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_activity SET activity_status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
UPDATE mk_activity SET user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, owner_phone = #{ownerPhone}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE activity_id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_activity_participant p WHERE p.activity_id = #{activityId}) as signupCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_activity_participant p WHERE p.activity_id = #{activityId} AND p.participate_status = '1') as signedCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_lead l WHERE l.activity_id = #{activityId} AND l.del_flag = '0') as leadCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_lead l WHERE l.activity_id = #{activityId} AND l.del_flag = '0' AND l.lead_grade = 'B') as mqlCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_lead l WHERE l.activity_id = #{activityId} AND l.del_flag = '0' AND l.lead_grade = 'A') as sqlCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_opportunity o WHERE o.lead_id IN (SELECT l.lead_id FROM mk_lead l WHERE l.activity_id = #{activityId}) AND o.del_flag = '0') as opportunityCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.actual_amount), 0) FROM mk_opportunity o WHERE o.lead_id IN (SELECT l.lead_id FROM mk_lead l WHERE l.activity_id = #{activityId}) AND o.del_flag = '0' AND o.opportunity_status = '1') as dealAmount FROM dual

SELECT a.activity_id, a.activity_no, a.activity_name, a.activity_type, a.activity_form, a.activity_status, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.target_count, a.summary, a.content, a.register_token, a.del_flag, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mk_activity_participant p WHERE p.activity_id = a.activity_id) as signup_count FROM mk_activity a WHERE a.activity_id = #{activityId} AND a.register_token = #{registerToken} AND a.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_activity SET register_token = #{registerToken}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
